LLM advisory: Acceptance criteria are missing for this story. No testable requirements are provided to verify the required attestation UI or enforcement behaviors.
LLM advisory: IN-SCOPE invariant INV-aca0b8f371dd9cbe (required field 'data_usage_attestation_checkbox') is not referenced in acceptance criteria.

LLM advisory: IN-SCOPE forbidden capability invariants (INV-efc6a0ec97f0ee52) preventing storage/generation of snapshots and training datasets without attestation are not addressed in acceptance criteria.
LLM advisory: IN-SCOPE hard-stop invariant INV-ef0f9f226562ce1d (bypass_data_usage_eligibility_gate) is not addressed; no acceptance criteria verify the gate cannot be bypassed.

LLM suggestion: Add AC: "UI displays a mandatory checkbox named 'data_usage_attestation_checkbox' on the review UI. The checkbox is unchecked by default. The checkbox text explicitly states that checked = permission to use reviewed documents/snapshots/annotations for model training or analytics. Attestation applies per document or per review session (specify which)."

LLM suggestion: Add AC: "When the attestation checkbox is not checked, attempts to persist document snapshots, store confirmations with snapshots, generate gold snapshots, or include documents in training exports MUST be blocked. The system returns a clear error and does not persist or export the artifacts."

LLM suggestion: Add AC: "Audit trail: the system records the attestation decision (user id, timestamp, document id/session id) for every persisted artifact. Attempts to persist or export without attestation must be logged and rejected."

LLM suggestion: Add AC: "Bypass protection: provide an automated test that attempts to bypass the UI (API/background job) to persist snapshots or produce training datasets without attestation; the attempt must be rejected and logged."

LLM suggestion: Add AC: "Behavioral detail: specify whether attestation is per-document or per-session and the exact gating points (e.g., on 'Save Snapshot', 'Generate Gold Snapshot', 'Export Training Dataset') so enforcement can be implemented and tested."

LLM suggestion: Add AC: 'Given attestation is NOT granted, attempts to bypass the data usage eligibility gate (API or UI) are rejected and logged as policy violations.'

LLM suggestion: Add test/automation ACs that exercise both positive (attestation granted -> exports allowed) and negative (attestation not granted -> exports blocked) flows, including audit/log records proving enforcement.

LLM advisory: Acceptance criteria are missing for the story scope, preventing objective verification of the Review State Engine and internal priority scoring behavior.

LLM suggestion: Add AC: "Given model confidence and heuristics, when the engine evaluates a document, then it emits one of {Green, Orange, Red} with deterministic rules documented (include thresholds or rule examples)."

LLM suggestion: Add AC: "Given a document with a computed state, when displayed in the review UI, then reviewers see only the state (Green/Orange/Red) and not raw numeric confidences or unaggregated model scores."

LLM suggestion: Add AC: "Given tie/edge cases (e.g., borderline confidences or conflicting heuristics), when the engine computes priority, then the engine applies documented tie-breaking logic and surface rationale in metadata for auditability."

LLM suggestion: Add AC: "Provide test fixtures: sample inputs and expected states/priorities for at least 10 representative cases (high/low/conflicted), and automated tests that assert the engine produces the expected state and priority ordering."

LLM suggestion: Note: Attestation-related invariants (e.g., mandatory attestation checkbox and training-export gating) appear in the spec but are OUT OF SCOPE for this story; ensure a separate story implements those attestation controls and gating before training/export capabilities are added.

LLM advisory: Missing/insufficient acceptance criteria: the story provides no measurable acceptance criteria for the review state engine (how states are derived, exact UI behavior, testable gating such as hiding raw confidences).

LLM suggestion: Add AC: 'Given a document with model output/confidence, when state engine evaluates it, then it deterministically maps to one of {Green, Orange, Red} and the UI displays only the state label and associated action guidance; numeric confidences are not shown.'
LLM suggestion: Add AC: 'The mapping rules (thresholds/heuristics/validation rules) are documented and covered by unit tests demonstrating representative inputs mapped to expected states.'

LLM suggestion: Add AC: 'When a document is marked Red, it is surfaced to reviewers with required remediation steps; when Green, reviewers can batch-accept; when Orange, it is routed for manual review priority—verify via end-to-end acceptance tests.'

LLM advisory: No acceptance criteria or implementation notes ensure the event-sourced store enforces the attestation/eligibility gate required by the spec.

LLM advisory: Story permits (or is ambiguous about) generating gold snapshots and storing immutable review actions without describing enforcement of attestation; this contradicts FORBIDDEN_CAPABILITY invariants.
LLM advisory: No described mechanism prevents bypassing the data usage eligibility gate in the proposed delta/store implementation.

LLM suggestion: Add AC: 'When a review action is recorded, the system must persist the attestation state with the action. If attestation is not granted, the action may be stored for audit but MUST NOT be stored together with document snapshots intended for gold snapshot derivation or training dataset production.'
LLM suggestion: Add AC: 'The pipeline that derives gold snapshots must check attestation for each source review; gold snapshot generation MUST be blocked for any items without attestation.'
LLM suggestion: Add AC: 'Training dataset export jobs must filter out any documents/reviews that lack attestation; exports that would include non-attested items must fail and log an audit event.'
LLM suggestion: Add AC: 'Implement and test an eligibility gate: attempts to bypass the gate (API calls, background jobs, or admin tools) must be rejected and audited.'

LLM suggestion: Implementation note: record per-action metadata (including attestation boolean and attestation timestamp) in the delta store and enforce gate checks in any snapshot/generation code paths.

LLM advisory: Missing enforcement for invariant INV-efc6a0ec97f0ee52: story does not state that confirmations will NOT be stored together with document snapshots when attestation is not granted.
LLM advisory: Missing enforcement for invariant INV-efc6a0ec97f0ee52: story does not state that gold snapshots will NOT be generated when attestation is not granted.
LLM advisory: Missing enforcement for invariant INV-efc6a0ec97f0ee52: story does not state that training datasets will NOT be produced when attestation is not granted.
LLM advisory: Missing enforcement for invariant INV-ef0f9f226562ce1d: story does not state that the data-usage eligibility gate cannot be bypassed by the event-sourcing/delta store.

LLM suggestion: Add acceptance criteria: 'Given an event-sourced review action where the reviewer has NOT granted data-usage attestation, when the system persists review actions or derives snapshots, then confirmations MUST NOT be stored together with document snapshots.'
LLM suggestion: Add acceptance criteria: 'Given a review session without attestation, the system MUST NOT generate gold snapshots.'
LLM suggestion: Add acceptance criteria: 'Given a review session without attestation, the system MUST NOT include data from that session in any training dataset export.'

LLM suggestion: Add acceptance criteria: 'The delta store and event-sourcing pipeline MUST enforce the data-usage eligibility gate and MUST NOT provide any API or internal bypass that allows snapshots, confirmations, or dataset exports when eligibility/attestation is not present.'

LLM suggestion: If the story only provides storage primitives (and not UI attestation), explicitly mark the UI attestation requirement (INV-aca0b8f371dd9cbe) as out-of-scope and reference the story that will implement the mandatory checkbox; otherwise, add AC tying storage behavior to the attestation state.

LLM advisory: No acceptance criteria or implementation details ensure that gold snapshot generation is blocked when data usage attestation is not granted (INV: generate_gold_snapshots_without_attestation).

LLM advisory: No acceptance criteria or implementation details ensure that production of training datasets is blocked when data usage attestation is not granted (INV: produce_training_datasets_without_attestation).

LLM advisory: No acceptance criteria or implementation details ensure that user confirmations are not stored together with document snapshots when attestation is not granted (INV: store_confirmations_with_snapshots_without_attestation).
LLM advisory: No acceptance criteria or implementation details ensure the data-usage eligibility gate cannot be bypassed (INV: bypass_data_usage_eligibility_gate).
LLM advisory: Acceptance criteria are missing or untestable for all in-scope invariants.

LLM suggestion: Add explicit acceptance criteria: "Given attestation is NOT granted, attempts to generate a gold snapshot must be rejected (e.g., HTTP 403) and no snapshot persisted; audit log records the blocked attempt."

LLM suggestion: Add explicit acceptance criteria: "Given attestation is NOT granted, attempts to produce training datasets must be rejected and no training export artifacts are created; system logs the denial."

LLM suggestion: Add explicit acceptance criteria: "When attestation is NOT granted, user confirmations must NOT be stored together with document snapshots; snapshots remain free of any attestation confirmations."

LLM suggestion: Add explicit acceptance criteria: "The data-usage eligibility gate cannot be bypassed: attempts to call export/generation endpoints without passing eligibility checks must fail and be auditable."

LLM suggestion: If the attestation UI (data_usage_attestation_checkbox) is implemented in a separate story, link that story and add an AC requiring the backend to validate that attestation state before allowing snapshot/export operations.
LLM suggestion: Implement automated tests and audit log checks that exercise negative flows (attestation absent) to prove enforcement of the forbidden capabilities.

LLM advisory: Acceptance criteria are missing for in-scope attestation and gating behavior required by the spec.
LLM advisory: Story does not specify the mandatory data_usage_attestation_checkbox (INV-aca0b8f371dd9cbe) or its required semantics.
LLM advisory: Story does not describe enforcement that gold snapshots, confirmations, or training dataset exports are blocked when attestation is not granted (INV-efc6a0ec97f0ee52).
LLM advisory: Story does not describe protections preventing bypass of the data usage eligibility gate (INV-ef0f9f226562ce1d).

LLM suggestion: Add AC: 'The review UI presents a data usage attestation checkbox (unchecked by default). The reviewer must explicitly check it to grant attestation for a document or review session. (Satisfies INV-aca0b8f371dd9cbe)'

LLM suggestion: Add AC: 'If attestation is not granted for a document/session, the system MUST NOT generate gold snapshots, MUST NOT store user confirmations together with document snapshots, and MUST NOT include the document in any training dataset export. Attempted generation/export in this state is blocked and logged. (Satisfies INV-efc6a0ec97f0ee52)'

LLM suggestion: Add AC: 'Any attempt to bypass the data usage eligibility gate (for example via API calls, admin actions, or background jobs) MUST be rejected and recorded as a policy violation; the system emits an auditable log entry. (Satisfies INV-ef0f9f226562ce1d)'

LLM suggestion: Add AC: 'Gold snapshots and immutable revision metadata must record the attestation state and immutable revision ID so audit trails can demonstrate whether a snapshot/export was allowed. (Supports auditability and ties enforcement to immutable revisioning)'

LLM advisory: Acceptance criteria are missing or empty for this story. Without testable acceptance criteria, the story cannot be verified for correctness or completeness for its implemented scope (derived artifact regeneration and corrected output delivery).

LLM suggestion: Add concrete, testable acceptance criteria. Example ACs to include:
- "Given a reviewer edits a document and triggers regeneration, when the regeneration completes, then the system delivers a complete corrected output file to the user without any manual rework, and the file matches the expected corrected content." 
- "Given a document edit, when regeneration is triggered, then the regenerated artifacts are produced deterministically (same input + same edit => same output) within X seconds (define SLA), and a success/failure status is returned to the UI." 
- "Given a regeneration event, when artifacts are delivered, then an immutable audit record is created containing: timestamp, revision id, user id, and artifact checksum, to support provenance and troubleshooting."

LLM suggestion: If this story will touch or enable downstream capabilities that produce snapshots, gold data, or training exports, add ACs that explicitly enforce attestation/eligibility checks per the spec (or explicitly state that this story does NOT affect those flows).

warnings: Story does not follow 'As a [persona], I want...' format

LLM advisory: Acceptance criteria are missing for the story's implemented scope (derived artifact regeneration and corrected output delivery). There are no testable ACs specifying determinism, delivery, latency, or artifact completeness.

LLM suggestion: Add AC: "Given a reviewer saves edits to a document, when derived artifacts are regenerated, then the corrected output file is delivered automatically to the user without manual steps within 30 seconds and the UI indicates completion."
LLM suggestion: Add AC: "Regeneration MUST be deterministic: repeated regeneration of the same inputs produces byte-for-byte identical derived artifacts (or identical canonical representation)."

LLM suggestion: Add AC: "Regenerated artifacts MUST include immutable revision IDs and provenance metadata (source document id, editor id, timestamp) so reviewers can correlate corrections to outputs."
LLM suggestion: Add AC: "If regeneration fails, the system surfaces an error to the reviewer with actionable remediation steps and does not require manual reassembly of outputs."

LLM advisory: Acceptance criteria are missing for the in-scope UI behaviour (assisted class selection & contextual guidance). Without AC, the story cannot be tested or verified against requirements for the implemented UI features.
LLM suggestion: Add concise, testable acceptance criteria that cover the UI behaviours in scope. Example ACs to add:

LLM suggestion: 1) Given a reviewer opens the classification UI, when the system recommends a pre-selected class, then the recommended class is shown as selected but editable and a visible label 'Recommended' is displayed.
LLM suggestion: 2) Given a reviewer views any recommended class, when the reviewer hovers or expands the item, then a human-readable description and a thumbnail are shown explaining the class.
LLM suggestion: 3) Given a reviewer filters classes, when an option is not valid for the current document metadata, then that option is not selectable and a tooltip explains why it's filtered.
LLM suggestion: 4) Given a reviewer changes the recommended class, when the reviewer saves the review, then the selected class is persisted and an explicit confirmation is shown.

LLM suggestion: If attestation behaviour is relevant for this story, add an explicit AC requiring the presence or absence of the data_usage_attestation_checkbox and how it gates downstream actions; otherwise explicitly state that attestation and export gating are out-of-scope for this story.

LLM advisory: No acceptance criteria provided to verify that the export pipeline enforces the attestation-based eligibility gate.
LLM advisory: Missing enforcement of in-scope invariant: produce_training_datasets_without_attestation (pipeline must NOT produce training datasets when attestation is not granted).
LLM advisory: Missing enforcement of in-scope invariant: generate_gold_snapshots_without_attestation (pipeline must NOT generate gold snapshots when attestation is not granted).

LLM advisory: Missing enforcement of in-scope invariant: store_confirmations_with_snapshots_without_attestation (confirmations must NOT be stored together with snapshots if attestation is not granted).
LLM advisory: Missing enforcement of in-scope invariant: bypass_data_usage_eligibility_gate (system must NOT allow bypass of the eligibility gate).

LLM suggestion: Add explicit acceptance criteria that exercise the eligibility gate. Examples:
- "Given a review without attestation, when the export job runs, then no training datasets are produced and the job records a 'blocked_due_to_attestation' outcome." 
- "Given a review with attestation, when the export job runs, then training datasets are produced and provenance/audit metadata records the attestation flag and review id."

LLM suggestion: Add ACs to assert forbidden side effects when attestation is absent:
- "No gold snapshots are generated for reviews lacking attestation." 
- "User confirmations are not stored together with document snapshots when attestation is absent."

LLM suggestion: Implement and test an explicit eligibility-check step in the pipeline that returns deterministic decisions (allow/deny) and emits audit log entries; add ACs that validate the audit logs contain the reason for blocking (e.g., 'attestation_missing').

LLM suggestion: Add integration tests that attempt to bypass the gate and assert the system rejects bypass attempts (e.g., API attempts to mark export eligible without attestation are denied with 4xx and logged).

LLM advisory: Acceptance criteria are missing; cannot verify that attestation gating and export prohibitions are implemented or testable.
LLM advisory: Missing required field: data_usage_attestation_checkbox (INV-aca0b8f371dd9cbe) is not described as implemented, displayed, or recorded in the story or AC.

LLM advisory: No assurance that forbidden capabilities are prevented: storing confirmations with snapshots, generating gold snapshots, producing training datasets, or bypassing the eligibility gate when attestation is not granted (INV-efc6a0ec97f0ee52; INV-ef0f9f226562ce1d).

LLM suggestion: Add acceptance criteria to require a per-document or per-session attestation checkbox: 'Given a reviewer viewing a document, the UI shows a data usage attestation checkbox unchecked by default; the reviewer must explicitly check it to enable reuse for training.'

LLM suggestion: Add acceptance criteria to enforce hard-stop behavior when attestation is not granted: 'Given attestation is not checked, the system must NOT store confirmations with document snapshots, must NOT generate gold snapshots, must NOT include the document in any training dataset export, and must not allow any bypass of the eligibility gate; attempts should be logged and surfaced to the operator.'

LLM suggestion: Add acceptance criteria to record attestation separately from document snapshots and to include an auditable flag that governs training-export eligibility: 'When attestation is granted, record a durable attestation record (separate from snapshot files) that can be used to filter exports; absence of this record must exclude documents from exports.'

LLM advisory: Acceptance criteria are missing. The story has no testable acceptance criteria to validate graph-assembly review behavior (topology/connectivity).

LLM advisory: Scope ambiguity: compiled authority contains attestation and gating invariants, but the story does not state whether attestation (data_usage_attestation_checkbox or gating) applies to this feature — cannot verify compliance without clarification.

LLM suggestion: Add concrete, testable acceptance criteria for the graph assembly review story. Example ACs:
- "Given a reviewer is editing graph topology, when they save changes, then the updated graph persists and downstream consumers see the updated topology (verify by fetching the assembled graph)."
- "Given a reviewer completes graph assembly, when they submit the review, then an audit record is created with reviewer id, timestamp, and change summary; the UI shows success confirmation."

LLM suggestion: Clarify whether data-usage attestation applies to this checkpoint. If attestation applies, add ACs enforcing the spec invariants and implementation details, for example:
- "The review UI presents a data_usage_attestation_checkbox (unchecked by default). If the checkbox is not checked, gold snapshots/training datasets MUST NOT be produced and confirmations MUST NOT be stored with snapshots."

LLM advisory: Acceptance criteria missing for this story; no testable statements ensure required attestation UI or enforcement of attestation gating.
LLM advisory: Story does not describe or require the required data_usage_attestation_checkbox (INV-aca0b8f371dd9cbe).

LLM advisory: Story does not describe measures to prevent forbidden capabilities when attestation is not granted (INV-efc6a0ec97f0ee52 / INV-ef0f9f226562ce1d): storing confirmations with snapshots, generating gold snapshots, producing training datasets, or bypassing the data-usage eligibility gate.

LLM suggestion: Add AC: 'The review UI presents a data usage attestation checkbox (unchecked by default). The checkbox text explicitly confirms documents/snapshots/annotations are eligible for reuse for training/analytics. Attestation can be applied per document or per review session.'

LLM suggestion: Add AC: 'When the attestation checkbox is not checked, the system MUST NOT store user confirmations together with document snapshots, MUST NOT generate gold snapshots, and MUST NOT include items in any training dataset/export.'

LLM suggestion: Add AC: 'Export/publish actions (consumer AAS packages, training dataset generation, gold snapshot creation) are blocked if attestation is not granted; attempting an export without attestation surfaces an error to the user and logs the attempt.'

LLM suggestion: Add AC: 'The data-usage eligibility gate is enforced server-side and cannot be bypassed by client or API calls. Include automated tests that attempt to call export endpoints without attestation and assert denial.'
LLM suggestion: Add AC: 'Audit trail: record attestation decisions, export attempts, and enforcement outcomes in the review audit log for provenance.'

LLM advisory: Acceptance criteria are missing. The story does not specify or test the required attestation UI or the export/production gating behavior mandated by the specification.

LLM advisory: Missing REQUIRED_FIELD: data_usage_attestation_checkbox — the story does not describe a mandatory attestation checkbox (unchecked by default, per-document or per-session) or include testable AC for it.

LLM advisory: Missing FORBIDDEN_CAPABILITY invariants: the story lacks AC asserting that (a) confirmations must not be stored with document snapshots without attestation, (b) gold snapshots must not be generated without attestation, (c) training datasets must not be produced without attestation, and (d) the data usage eligibility gate must not be bypassable.

LLM suggestion: Add AC: 'Given a review session, the UI presents a mandatory data usage attestation checkbox (unchecked by default). The reviewer must explicitly check it before any export or training-data generation is enabled.'
LLM suggestion: Add AC: 'When attestation is not granted, attempts to store confirmations with document snapshots are rejected and no combined snapshot+confirmation records are persisted.'
LLM suggestion: Add AC: 'When attestation is not granted, the system must not generate gold snapshots or include documents in gold snapshot exports.'
LLM suggestion: Add AC: 'When attestation is not granted, the system must not produce or include documents in any training dataset exports; export endpoints return a forbidden/error state.'

LLM suggestion: Add AC: 'The data usage eligibility gate cannot be bypassed by any UI path, API, or backend process; include automated tests that attempt bypass and assert the gate blocks export/production.'

LLM suggestion: Add implementation-level acceptance tests and audit logs: verify attestation checkbox state, verify export attempts are blocked without attestation, and record an auditable event when exports succeed after attestation.

LLM advisory: No acceptance criteria provided for in-scope requirements that enforce attestation gating and forbidden capabilities.
LLM advisory: Missing explicit enforcement for invariant INV-efc6a0ec97f0ee52: store_confirmations_with_snapshots_without_attestation must be prevented for this feature.
LLM advisory: Missing explicit enforcement for invariant INV-efc6a0ec97f0ee52: generate_gold_snapshots_without_attestation must be prevented for this feature.
LLM advisory: Missing explicit enforcement for invariant INV-efc6a0ec97f0ee52: produce_training_datasets_without_attestation must be prevented for this feature.
LLM advisory: Missing explicit enforcement for invariant INV-ef0f9f226562ce1d: bypass_data_usage_eligibility_gate must be impossible for this feature.

LLM suggestion: Add AC: 'Given a document review record, record attestation metadata (status, actor id, timestamp, reason if declined) together with revision id, input hash, and immutable event record.'
LLM suggestion: Add AC: 'Given attestation == not_granted, attempts to store user confirmations with document snapshots MUST be rejected and logged; snapshots must not include confirmations.'
LLM suggestion: Add AC: 'Given attestation == not_granted, the system MUST NOT generate gold snapshots; any request to generate must be blocked and audited.'

LLM suggestion: Add AC: 'Given attestation == not_granted, the system MUST NOT include the document in any exported training dataset; dataset generation requests must filter by attestation status and be auditable.'

LLM suggestion: Add AC: 'The system MUST enforce the data usage eligibility gate (cannot be bypassed). Include an automated test that attempts to bypass the gate and asserts failure and an audit log entry.'

LLM suggestion: Implementation suggestion: persist attestation metadata as part of the immutable event-sourced record and include it in any downstream decision logic that gates snapshot creation and dataset exports.

LLM suggestion: Implementation suggestion: include automated unit/integration tests that confirm forbidden capabilities are blocked when attestation is not granted and that audit logs capture the blocking decision.

LLM advisory: No acceptance criteria provided to validate enforcement of in-scope forbidden capabilities: the story does not include testable ACs to ensure the system will NOT store confirmations with document snapshots, generate gold snapshots, produce training datasets when attestation is not granted, or allow bypassing of the data-usage eligibility gate.
LLM advisory: Missing explicit acceptance criteria to verify audit/gate enforcement for: store_confirmations_with_snapshots_without_attestation (forbidden)
LLM advisory: Missing explicit acceptance criteria to verify audit/gate enforcement for: generate_gold_snapshots_without_attestation (forbidden)
LLM advisory: Missing explicit acceptance criteria to verify audit/gate enforcement for: produce_training_datasets_without_attestation (forbidden)
LLM advisory: Missing explicit acceptance criteria to verify audit/gate enforcement for: bypass_data_usage_eligibility_gate (hard system invariant)

LLM suggestion: Add AC: "Given a document with attestation NOT granted, when the system attempts to persist a document snapshot or derived annotations, then the save must be blocked and an auditable denial event MUST be recorded (include reason: attestation=false)."

LLM suggestion: Add AC: "Given a document with attestation NOT granted, when any gold snapshot generation is attempted, then generation MUST be prevented and an auditable event logged; confirm no gold snapshot artifact is produced."

LLM suggestion: Add AC: "Given a document with attestation NOT granted, when any training dataset build or export runs, then the document MUST NOT be included and the build must record the exclusion reason in the audit trail."

LLM suggestion: Add AC: "Given normal and adversarial flows, attempts to bypass the data-usage eligibility gate MUST be detected and blocked; provide an automated test that simulates bypass attempts and verifies the gate prevents storage/export and logs the attempt."
